title: STAC Extension Liability Claims v1.6.0
description: STAC extension for liability claims, data quality (ISO 19157), provenance (W3C PROV), imagery interpretability (NIIRS), and ISO 20151 data space interoperability fields (usage policy, data contracts, sovereignty constraints).

oneOf.$comment: This is the schema for STAC Items.
This is the schema for STAC Collections.

require_any_field.$comment: Please list all fields here so that we can force the existence of one of them in other parts of the schemas.

fields.$comment: Add your new fields here. Don't require them here, do that above in the corresponding schema.

liability:responsible_party.description: Name or identifier of the party responsible for the liability or claim

liability:claim_status.description: Current status of the liability claim

liability:claim_id.description: Unique identifier for the liability claim

liability:claim_date.description: Date when the claim was filed (RFC 3339 format)

liability:claim_type.description: Type or category of the liability claim

liability:coverage_area.description: GeoJSON geometry representing the geographic area affected by the claim

role.description: Role or relationship to the claim (e.g., claimant, witness, third_party)

contact.description: Contact information for the affected party

liability:affected_parties.description: List of parties affected by or involved in the claim

liability:damages_currency.description: Currency code for damages (ISO 4217, e.g., USD, EUR, GBP)

liability:legal_jurisdiction.description: Legal jurisdiction under which the claim falls

liability:incident_date.description: Date when the incident occurred that led to the claim (RFC 3339 format)

liability:resolution_date.description: Date when the claim was resolved (RFC 3339 format)

liability:resolution_status.description: Final resolution outcome of the claim

liability:insurance_provider.description: Name of the insurance provider covering the claim

liability:policy_number.description: Insurance policy number associated with the claim

liability:evidence_refs.description: References to evidence documents, images, or other supporting materials (URIs or STAC Asset keys)

liability:notes.description: Additional notes or comments about the claim

liability:origin.description: Origin or source organization of the claim data

liability:quality.description: Data quality report using ISO 19157-1:2023 from canonical eovoc schema (RECOMMENDED) or ISO 19115/19115-4 (backward compatibility). ISO 19157 provides comprehensive quality framework with metaquality, usability, and standardized evaluation methods.

liability:prov.description: W3C PROV-JSON provenance information following PROV-DM model with entities, activities, and agents. For OGC Building Blocks compatibility, prefer referencing ogc.ogc-utils.prov. Maintains identity and provenance compatibility across all quality frameworks.

liability:niirs.title: NIIRS Interpretability Rating
liability:niirs.description: National Imagery Interpretability Rating Scale (NIIRS) metadata for imagery quality and interpretability assessment. Provides standardized ratings (0-9) for different sensor types, evaluation methods, verified tasks, and GIQE predictions. See https://irp.fas.org/imint/niirs.htm

overall.description: Overall NIIRS rating (0-9) representing the primary interpretability level of the imagery. 0 = interpretability precluded, 9 = detect fastener slot types/individual railroad tie spikes.

variants.description: Sensor-specific NIIRS ratings for different spectral/sensor types. Allows multi-modal imagery to specify different interpretability ratings per sensor.

visible.description: Visible spectrum NIIRS rating (March 1994 standard) for photographic/panchromatic imagery

radar.description: Radar NIIRS rating (August 1992 standard) for Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery

infrared.description: Infrared NIIRS rating (April 1996 standard) for thermal/IR imagery

multispectral.description: Multispectral NIIRS rating (February 1995 standard) for multi-band imagery

evaluation_method.description: Method used to determine the NIIRS rating. subjective_analyst_rating = human expert evaluation, giqe_prediction = General Image Quality Equation calculation, automated_assessment = algorithmic evaluation, comparative_analysis = comparison with reference imagery, operational_validation = field-verified tasks, vendor_specification = manufacturer-provided rating

evaluation_date.description: Date and time when the NIIRS evaluation was performed (RFC 3339 format)

evaluated_by.description: Name or identifier of the analyst, organization, or system that performed the NIIRS evaluation

tasks_verified.description: List of specific NIIRS tasks (from the standard task tables) that were verified as achievable with this imagery. Examples: 'Identify vehicle spare tires (NIIRS 6)', 'Distinguish antenna shapes as parabolic/rectangular (NIIRS 6)', 'Detect aircraft wing configuration (NIIRS 3)'

giqe_predicted.description: NIIRS value predicted by the General Image Quality Equation (GIQE) based on sensor physical parameters (GSD, RER, SNR, overshoot). Used for validation against empirical rating.

giqe_parameters.description: Physical sensor parameters used in GIQE calculation for predicted NIIRS

gsd.description: Ground Sample Distance in meters - spatial resolution

rer.description: Relative Edge Response - measure of image sharpness (0-1)

overshoot.description: Edge overshoot percentage - measure of image enhancement artifacts

confidence.description: Confidence level in the NIIRS rating assessment. high = validated with ground truth, medium = analyst consensus, low = preliminary/unverified

notes.description: Additional notes about the NIIRS evaluation, limitations, or special conditions

liability:data_space.title: Data Space Participation
liability:data_space.description: ISO 20151 data space ecosystem and participant role for this STAC asset

id.description: Unique URI/DID of the data space

name.description: Human-readable name of the data space

operator.description: DID or URL of the data space operator

connector_url.description: IDS / EDC connector endpoint URL for protocol negotiation

liability:usage_policy.title: Usage Policy (ODRL / ISO 20151 paragraph 8)
liability:usage_policy.description: Machine-readable usage policy using W3C ODRL vocabulary as required by ISO 20151

liability:data_contract.title: Data Contract (ISO 20151 paragraph 9)
liability:data_contract.description: Reference to the executed data contract governing this asset

liability:sovereignty.title: Data Sovereignty Constraints (ISO 20151 paragraph 7)
liability:sovereignty.description: Data sovereignty constraints aligned with GDPR Art. 5 and GAIA-X Trust Framework

data_residency.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or regional codes where data may reside and be processed

purpose.description: Declared purpose URI from W3C DPV (https://w3id.org/dpv)

export_restrictions.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes of countries to which data may not be exported

ard:geometric_accuracy.description: Flattened geometric accuracy metric from ISO 19157 DQ_AbsoluteExternalPositionalAccuracy, enabling simple API queries. Value is mirrored from liability:quality.report[] for queryability. Unit specified in ard:geometric_accuracy_unit.

ard:geometric_accuracy_unit.description: Unit of measurement for geometric accuracy (e.g., 'meter', 'degree'). Corresponds to ISO 19157 valueUnit.

ard:geometric_accuracy_type.description: Error statistic type for geometric accuracy (e.g., 'rRMSE', 'CE90', 'LE90'). Corresponds to ISO 19157 measureDescription.

ard:radiometric_accuracy.description: Flattened radiometric accuracy metric from ISO 19157 DQ_ThematicClassificationCorrectness, enabling simple API queries. Value is mirrored from liability:quality.report[] for queryability. Unit specified in ard:radiometric_accuracy_unit.

ard:radiometric_accuracy_unit.description: Unit of measurement for radiometric accuracy (e.g., 'percentage', 'dB', 'W/m²/sr/μm'). Corresponds to ISO 19157 valueUnit.

ard:cloud_coverage.description: Cloud coverage percentage for optical sensor products (0-100). Enables simple API filtering for cloud-free imagery.

ard:data_mask_coverage.description: Data mask coverage percentage for radar sensor products (0-100). Indicates invalid/masked pixels due to radar shadowing, layover, or other artifacts.

ard:specification_compliance.description: Boolean indicating overall compliance with CEOS-ARD Product Family Specification (PFS). True if all Threshold requirements met.

ard:pfs_threshold_compliance.description: Categorical status of CEOS-ARD PFS Threshold requirements compliance. 'all' = all requirements met, 'partial' = some requirements met, 'none' = no compliance.

ard:pfs_target_compliance.description: Percentage (0-100) of CEOS-ARD PFS Target requirements achieved. Target requirements represent aspirational quality goals beyond mandatory Threshold requirements.

dq:quality.description: EOVOC-compatible alias for data quality reporting. Array of ISO 19157-1:2023 DataQuality or ISO 19115 quality reports. Use this field for interoperability with eovoc eof-eos-stac-extension and other dq:* consumers. Equivalent to liability:quality but array-based per eovoc convention.

dq:lineage.description: EOVOC-compatible alias for lineage information. Array of ISO 19115-1:2014 LI_Lineage objects describing data provenance, processing history, and sources. Use this field for interoperability with eovoc eof-eos-stac-extension and OGC metadata standards. Equivalent to liability:quality lineage elements but as separate top-level field per eovoc convention.

dq:extendedLineage.description: ISO 19115-2:2019 extended lineage for imagery and gridded data. Array of LE_Lineage objects with enhanced LE_ProcessStep (includes LE_Processing for detailed algorithm documentation), LE_Source (with sensor/platform details), and LE_ProcessParameter (structured processing parameters). Use alongside dq:lineage for imagery workflows requiring detailed processing documentation. OPTIONAL extension - dq:lineage (LI_* basic lineage) is sufficient for most use cases.

asset_fields.$comment: Asset-level fields for security classification and access restrictions

liability:security_classification.description: Security classification level of the asset

liability:access_restrictions.description: List of access restrictions or requirements (e.g., legal hold, court order, privacy constraints)

liability:required_roles.description: Roles required to access this asset (enforced at API level via OpenAPI security schemes)

asset_all_fields.$comment: Combined fields for asset objects - includes both item-level and asset-specific fields

liability:origin.description: Origin or source organization of the claim data

liability:quality.description: Data quality report using ISO 19157-1:2023 (RECOMMENDED) or ISO 19115/19115-4 (backward compatibility)

liability:access_control.description: DEPRECATED in v1.1.0: Use API-level security schemes (OpenAPI securitySchemes) instead. This field will be removed in v2.0.0.

liability:alternate.description: DEPRECATED in v1.1.0: Use standard STAC assets with different hrefs or links with rel='alternate' instead. This field will be removed in v2.0.0.

liability:security_classification.description: Security classification level of the asset

liability:access_restrictions.description: List of access restrictions or requirements (e.g., legal hold, court order, privacy constraints)

liability:required_roles.description: Roles required to access this asset (enforced at API level via OpenAPI security schemes)

iso19115_conformance_result.$comment: Conformance result for ISO 19115 DQ assessments

pass.description: Whether the data conforms to the referenced specification

valueType.description: Type of value (e.g., percentage, absolute, count)

units.description: Units for numeric values, if applicable

method.description: Method used to compute the measure

reference.description: Reference to dataset, standard or procedure used

testsPerformed.description: Descriptions of checks or tests performed

statement.description: General explanation of the data producer's knowledge about the lineage of a dataset

scope.description: Type of resource and/or extent to which the lineage information applies

items.description: Information about an event or transformation in the life of the dataset

description.description: Description of the event, including related parameters or tolerances

rationale.description: Requirement or purpose for the process step

stepDateTime.description: Date, time, and/or range of the process step (ISO 19115 CI_Date - supports datetime, date, year-month, or year formats)

processor.description: Identification of, and means of communication with, person(s) and organization(s) associated with the process step

scope.description: Type of resource and/or extent to which the process step applies

processingInformation.description: Additional details about the process step (ISO 19115-4 extension)

source.description: Information about the source data used in creating the data specified by the scope

description.description: Detailed description of the level of the source data

sourceCitation.description: Recommended reference to be used for the source data

sourceReferenceSystem.description: Spatial reference system used by the source data

sourceMetadata.description: References to metadata for the source

scope.description: Type of resource and/or extent of the source

sourceExtent.description: Spatial and temporal extent of the source data

iso19115_2_extended_lineage.description: ISO 19115-2:2019 LE_Lineage - Extended lineage with imagery-specific processing details

statement.description: General explanation of the data producer's knowledge about the lineage of a dataset

scope.description: Type of resource and/or extent to which the lineage information applies

processStep.description: ISO 19115-2 LE_ProcessStep - Enhanced process steps with detailed processing information

items.description: LE_ProcessStep: Extended process step including detailed algorithm and parameter documentation

description.description: Description of the event, including related parameters or tolerances

rationale.description: Requirement or purpose for the process step

stepDateTime.description: Date, time, and/or range of the process step

processor.description: Identification of, and means of communication with, person(s) and organization(s) associated with the process step

processingInformation.description: ISO 19115-2 LE_Processing - Detailed processing algorithm and parameter information

identifier.description: Unique identifier for this processing instance

procedureDescription.description: Additional details about the procedure used for the process step

runTimeParameters.description: Parameters for executing the processing algorithm (deprecated - prefer processParameters array for structured parameters)

processParameters.description: ISO 19115-2 LE_ProcessParameter - Structured processing parameters with names, values, and metadata

value.description: Parameter value (string, number, boolean, or object)

valueType.description: Data type of the parameter value (string, number, boolean, object, array)

units.description: Units of measurement for the parameter

description.description: Description of the parameter's purpose and effect

output.description: LE_Source references for data generated by this process step

report.description: ISO 19115-2 LE_ProcessStepReport - Quality reports specific to this processing step

description.description: Textual description of the processing report

fileType.description: Type of the processing report file (e.g., PDF, HTML)

source.description: ISO 19115-2 LE_Source - Extended source information with sensor and platform metadata

le_source_ref.description: ISO 19115-2 LE_Source - Extended source with sensor, platform, and processing metadata

description.description: Detailed description of the source data

sourceCitation.description: Recommended reference to be used for the source data

sourceReferenceSystem.description: Spatial reference system used by the source data

sourceExtent.description: Spatial and temporal extent of the source data

processedLevel.description: ISO 19115-2 LE_Source: Processing level of the source data (e.g., L1A, L1B, L2A)

resolution.description: ISO 19115-2 LE_Source: Spatial resolution of the source

type.description: Type of sensor (e.g., optical, SAR, multispectral)
Type of platform (e.g., satellite, aircraft, UAV)

level.description: Processing level code (e.g., L1A, L1B, L2A)

scope.description: Scope of the report (e.g., dataset, series, feature)

date.description: Date when the quality report was generated

elements.description: List of data quality elements and their measures

prov_entity.$comment: W3C PROV Entity - A physical, digital, conceptual, or other kind of thing with some fixed aspects

prov_activity.$comment: W3C PROV Activity - Something that occurs over a period of time and acts upon or with entities

prov_agent.$comment: W3C PROV Agent - Something that bears some form of responsibility for an activity

prov:type.description: Type of the agent (Person, Organization, SoftwareAgent)

prov_relation.$comment: W3C PROV Relation - Generic relation structure

prov_document.$comment: W3C PROV-JSON Document - Complete provenance document following PROV-JSON serialization

entity.description: Map of entity identifiers to entity objects

activity.description: Map of activity identifiers to activity objects

agent.description: Map of agent identifiers to agent objects

wasInformedBy.description: Activity was informed by another Activity

wasDerivedFrom.description: Entity was derived from another Entity

actedOnBehalfOf.description: Agent acted on behalf of another Agent

specializationOf.description: Entity is a specialization of another Entity

alternateOf.description: Entity is an alternate of another Entity

summaries.$comment: Collection-level summaries of liability-claims fields (aligned with T21-DQ4IPT pattern)
summaries.description: Summarized information about the range of values in the Collection for liability-claims fields

liability:claim_status.description: Array of unique claim status values in the collection

liability:claim_type.description: Array of unique claim type values in the collection

liability:security_classification.description: Array of unique security classification levels in the collection

liability:responsible_party.description: Array of unique responsible parties in the collection

oneOf.description: Array of unique damage estimate values

liability:damages_estimated.description: Range or array of damage estimates in the collection

liability:legal_jurisdiction.description: Array of unique legal jurisdictions in the collection

liability:origin.description: Array of unique data origins in the collection

action.description: ODRL action term (e.g. use, reproduce, distribute, commercialize)
